Thus.. the dispositor of natal saturn gives an idea of how the destiny
would be for a native in terms of his profession. Therefore. while analyzing
profession as per 6hrigu technique one has to see the placement of
Saturn and the depositor of Saturn, if Saturn is placed in a inimical sign
and the depositor is in the sthh ouse one can easily predict that the
native will have to face frustration with respect to his profession,
whatever may the Yogas existing in the horoscope.
